description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beer can with a deep red body and a metallic gold top. The front features large, bold white and gold text, with additional smaller gold text and decorative lines encircling the can. The top is equipped with a standard pull tab, also in gold, and the can's surface appears smooth and reflective. The label design is minimalistic but striking, with a strong emphasis on typography and color contrast. The can is likely made of aluminum and is designed to hold liquid, with a sealed top and a slightly concave bottom for stability.
description: A tall, red and gold metallic beer can with bold white and gold text and a smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with large white and gold text and detailed branding.
description_view_1: Side view with partial label text visible and more of the plain red surface exposed.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the plain red surface with minimal label details.
description_view_3: Angled side view with partial label text and gold decorative lines visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold, sans-serif typography in white and gold, with clean horizontal gold lines and minimal decorative elements on a deep red background. The design is modern and visually striking, focusing on strong color contrast and clear text.
